source_article: The Rod & The Cast (Lovoll & Borger); data/sexyloops.com/rodcast.shtml
note: Event frames from the Cast #1 forward stroke (movie cast01_m1, ~500 fps capture, burned-in clock). RSP located by visual inspection (rod first straight, loop nose forming, clock ~00:60 = 0.60 s); the other events use the article's exact inter-event timing (Table 1) converted to frames at 500 fps. All four events fall in frames 228-331, i.e. within the first ~0.66 s of real time -- which is within the first 12 s of the 30 fps playback (frame 331 -> ~11.0 s). Frames are grayscale, downscaled and labelled.
